nasb.text: And there will be goats’ milk enough for your food, For the food of your household, And sustenance for your maidens.

esv.text: There will be enough goats’ milk for your food, for the food of your household and maintenance for your girls.

cnv.text: 山羊奶足夠作你的食物， 也足夠作你一家的食物， 並且足夠維持你眾婢女的生活。

ccb.text: 母山羊的奶足够你和家人喝， 也够养活你的仆婢。

csbs.text: 山羊的奶足够作你的食物、 作你家人的食物， 也足够养活你的使女们。
